# Diagram: research/api/deploy.sh


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Mermaid

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> SetColors[Set color variables<br/>red, green, yellow, reset]
    SetColors --> ChangeDir[cd /home/ec2-user/FV-Platform-Main/research]
    ChangeDir --> PrintMsg[Echo: updating code repository]
    PrintMsg --> GetBranch[BRANCH = git branch --show-current]
    GetBranch --> Pull[git pull origin $BRANCH]
    Pull --> End([End])
```
